modules.description: Streamline repetitive tasks through AI-powered workflows including document drafting and meeting summaries.

title: AI for Frontline Impact: A Behavioural Capacity Building Programme
description: A behavioral capacity building program designed to introduce AI concepts to frontline workers through interactive and culturally relevant methods, emphasizing practical applications and safety awareness.

modules.title: Curiosity - AI Kya Hai (What is AI)?
modules.description: Introduces AI through playful interaction with drawing, images, translation, and voice to reduce fear and increase accessibility without technical requirements.

modules.title: Freedom - AI Kaha Use Hota Hai? (Where is AI used?)
modules.description: Helps participants understand AI applications in personal, family, and work contexts, positioning AI as a supportive thinking and creative tool.

modules.title: Show and Tell - Mera AI, Meri Unnati (My AI, My Success)
modules.description: Guides participants in applying AI to real-life scenarios including personal growth, business ventures, and aspirations for advancement.

modules.title: Safety - Samajh aur Savdhaani (Safety & Risk Mitigation)
modules.description: Trains participants to identify digital risks through gamified learning, including spotting deepfakes and using AI as a fact-checking resource.

title: My Style Career Lab - AI Reskilling Program
description: An AI literacy and reskilling initiative featuring hands-on workshops on Gemini, Google AI Essentials certification, and sector-specific tutorials for tourism and MSME sectors.

modules.title: Module 1
modules.description: On-site seminar with hands-on workshop on Gemini and AI literacy fundamentals.

modules.title: Module 2
modules.description: Core learning on Google AI Essentials with a 50-question assessment.

modules.title: Module 3
modules.description: Elective learning with sector-specific tutorials targeting tourism and MSME sectors.

modules.title: Module 4
modules.description: Online salon and community session for learning reflection and peer discussion.

title: AI Accelerate Programme
description: Build confidence and move from curiosity to action using the AI Impact Map to identify where technology can handle routine tasks, freeing you to focus on work only you can do.

modules.title: The AI-Ready Mindset
modules.description: Build Your Confidence. Move from curiosity to action by using the AI Impact Map to identify where technology can handle the routine.

modules.title: Productivity Engineering
modules.description: Sharpen Your Toolkit. Discover advanced prompting and the Save-One-Hour Lab to streamline daily tasks with greater precision.

modules.title: Intelligent Research & Data Safety
modules.description: Work Smarter and Safer. Learn to manage information overload using AI while maintaining data integrity and responsible privacy habits.

modules.title: The Career Edge and Future Proofing
modules.description: Own Your Growth. Enhance your professional brand by using AI to refine your resume and interview skills.

modules.title: The Live Implementation Workshop
modules.description: Grow Together. Join a collaborative session to apply new skills to real-world tasks and stay ahead of the AI curve.

title: AI Literacy for Everyone: Understand, Apply, Create
description: Learn core AI concepts, productivity tools, prompt techniques, and responsible use to stay ahead in digital innovation through three comprehensive modules.

modules.title: AI Fundamentals
modules.description: Learn core AI concepts, productivity tools, prompt techniques, and responsible use to stay ahead in digital innovation.

modules.title: Generative AI
modules.description: Explore how AI creates text and visuals using Large Language Models (LLMs) and creative prompting.

modules.title: Responsible AI
modules.description: Understand ethical principles, data privacy, and applying AI responsibly through cloud technologies.
